name: direphish
description: DirePhish — Swarm-predict what goes wrong next

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && pnpm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && portless api.direphish --app-port 5001 --force -- uv run python run.py
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && portless direphish --force -- pnpm run dev
scripts.frontend:wait: wait-on -t 120000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5001/health && cd frontend && portless direphish --force -- pnpm run dev
